# tdd-smoke fixture

Fixture project for STE-225 AC.9 — the `/dev-process-toolkit:tdd` headless live smoke. Single trivial FR (`STE-SMOKE`): function `add(a, b)` that returns the sum of two numbers.

## Key Commands

```bash
bun test
```

**Gating rule:** every change must pass `bun test`.
